name: Solana Web3.js
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); requires Solana RPC endpoint (mainnet or devnet)

auth.notes: Devnet: public RPC; Mainnet: RPC provider API key (Helius, QuickNode, Alchemy)

performance.notes: Solana's fast block time (400ms) enables lower latency than EVM chains; WebSocket subscriptions for real-time

agent_readiness.notes: Official Solana TypeScript SDK for reading/writing to the Solana blockchain. v2 is a complete rewrite with better TypeScript types, tree-shaking, and functional API. Read accounts, send transactions, interact with programs (Anchor), token operations (SPL token), NFTs. WebSocket subscriptions for real-time account/slot updates. Used by Solana DApps, bots, and analytics.

gotchas: v2 is a breaking rewrite from v1 — migration required for existing projects
Solana account model differs significantly from EVM — higher learning curve
Transaction size limits (1232 bytes) constrain complex operations
RPC rate limits on public endpoints; mainnet requires paid provider
best_when: Solana DApp development and program (smart contract) interaction
High-throughput DeFi bots leveraging Solana's fast block times
SPL token and NFT operations on Solana
Real-time Solana account monitoring via WebSocket
avoid_when: Non-technical teams (Solana's account model is complex)
Projects requiring mature documentation (v2 is newer)
summary: Solana Web3.js v2 is the official TypeScript SDK for Solana blockchain interaction. Complete v2 rewrite with improved TypeScript types, tree-shaking, and functional API. Read accounts, send transactions, interact with programs, SPL tokens, and NFTs. WebSocket subscriptions for real-time updates. Used by Solana DApps and trading bots leveraging Solana's 400ms block times.
